description: Upper fragment: Letter from Shela b. Mevasser to Abū l-Faraj Yeshuʿa b. Yefet. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: 1094–1111 CE.  About a sum of dinars which Mevorakh b. Seʿadya (here called Sar ha-Sarim) had sent for Shela but which did not arrive. Abū Isḥāq Ibrāhīm Ibn קדורה came and told Shela that he had mistakenly given the money to Abū Sahl (probably Menashshe) Ibn al-Qaṭāʾif. The addressee is asked to wait for Abū Sahl and obtain the money. If Abū Sahl is delayed, Mevorakh should be informed. (Information from Frenkel.)
description_he: שבר מכתב משלה בן מבשר לאבו אל-פרג' ישועה בן יפת, 1094–1111. בעניין סכום דינרים שנשלח על ידי מבורך בן סעדיה ונמסר בטעות לאחר.
